name: Donkey Kong
description: Nintendo series centered on Donkey Kong, spanning arcade platformers, jungle platformers, and character-driven spin-offs.

eras.title: Arcade Era
eras.description: Original arcade platformers that introduced Donkey Kong and Mario.

eras.title: Country Era
eras.description: Rare-developed platformers that redefined Donkey Kong as a jungle platforming franchise.

eras.title: Modern Country Era
eras.description: Retro Studios revival of the Donkey Kong Country style.
